title: What Is Subject-To Real Estate? A Complete Investor Guide

title: What Is Seller Financing? How Owner Finance Works for Real Estate Investors
hook: No bank. No appraisal. No 6% commission. Just two parties agreeing on terms and closing in days.
description: Seller financing explained: how owner financing works, typical terms, pros and cons, and how to find seller finance deals.

title: The BRRRR Strategy Explained — How to Recycle Capital and Build a Rental Portfolio

description: BRRRR real estate strategy explained: Buy, Rehab, Rent, Refinance, Repeat. Learn how to recycle capital and build a rental portfolio faster.

hook: Entry, payment, rent, ARV, equity. The 5 numbers to run before anything else on any sub-to or seller finance deal.
description: Learn how to underwrite subject-to and seller finance deals. Key numbers, cash flow analysis, and deal evaluation framework.
